body:
# Description

Create example .audiagentic/ project scaffold.

# [PKT-FND-003](task-0024): Example Project Scaffold

## Purpose

Create an example `.audiagentic/` project scaffold.

## Scope

- Project structure
- Configuration files
- Example workflows
- Documentation

## Implementation

1. Define project structure
2. Create configuration templates
3. Add example workflows
4. Write documentation

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Scaffold creates valid project
2. All configuration files present
3. Documentation complete
